headline: Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, Apple earnings: What to expect
summary: Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Meta (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Apple (AAPL) are all reporting quarterly earnings results this week. D.A. Davidson head of technology research Gil Luria joins Yahoo Finance to discuss his outlook for the results and the questions to which he'll be looking for answers.

content.title: Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, Apple earnings: What to expect
content.description:
Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Meta (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Apple (AAPL) are all reporting quarterly earnings results this week.

D.A. Davidson head of technology research Gil Luria joins Yahoo Finance to discuss his outlook for the results and the questions to which he'll be looking for answers.
content.summary: Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Meta (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Apple (AAPL) are all reporting quarterly earnings results this week. D.A. headline: Nvidia’s (NVDA) Explosive Run May See Limits Going Forward, Warns JPMorgan
summary: Chipmaker Nvidia (NVDA) has seen a strong rally recently, but not everyone on Wall Street believes it can keep going at the same pace. Indeed, JPMorgan (JPM) strategist Mislav Matejka said he still likes semiconductor stocks and remains positive on the group, but he also warned that the market may not behave the same way it did last year. While Nvidia surged about 120% over a six-month stretch in 2025 after a weak first quarter, Matejka believes that the conditions for another similar run are no
